title: Realliance Community
description:
A modpack for the Realliance Community server

https://community.realliance.net/
body:
# Something for everyone,

The ReA community modpack is focused on having something for everyone. Whether it's intensive technical challenges, adventure and combat, or building and farming, we're hoping his pack provides as way to get into modded Minecraft.

## About Realliance

We are a group of friends and engineers who have been playing modded minecraft for nearly a decade together. We've always been more of players and server admins than authors, but this pack is a first "hello" back into the authorship side of things in years. Enjoy!

Find out more about us [here.](https://realliance.net/)

## Attribution

This modpack contains Deep Mob Learning: Refabrication, which is being redistributed in this modpack from curseforge. More information about this mod and an official download can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-mob-learning-refabricated).
